mapper.insert:
insert into clazz
name, room, begin_date, end_date, master_id, subject,
#{name}, #{room}, #{beginDate}, #{endDate}, #{masterId}, #{subject},
mapper.delete:
delete from clazz where id in
#{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COALESCE(c.name,'其他') clazzList,COUNT(*) dataList FROM student s LEFT JOIN clazz c ON s.clazz_id=c.id GROUP BY s.clazz_id,c.name ORDER BY dataList
select (case degree when 1 then '初中' when 2 then '高中' when 3 then '大专' when 4 then '本科' when 5 then '硕士' when 6 then '博士' else '其他' end) name, count(*) value from student group by degree;
